title: Paper Bot Core
summary: Paper-only Trading Bot foundation. It reviews a mock signal, checks risk, creates a blocked paper decision, and points to the next safe action.

steps.title: Signal
steps.summary: A sample signal exists for paper review only.
steps.detail: MOCK_SIGNAL_001.json uses mock symbol EUR_USD_MOCK and cannot route orders.

steps.title: Decision
steps.summary: The paper decision is blocked until mock conditions pass.
steps.detail: MOCK_DECISION_001.json blocks because confidence and sample size are not strong enough.

steps.title: Risk Gate
steps.detail: Latency, regime, confidence, and sample size must pass before paper simulation.

steps.title: Paper Trade
steps.summary: No paper trade simulation runs while risk is blocked.

steps.title: Scorecard
steps.summary: No score can be trusted before enough paper samples exist.
steps.detail: Scorecard fields include trade count, win rate, expectancy, profit factor, max drawdown, and confidence.

steps.title: Next Action
steps.summary: Review the mock signal and risk gate before any paper simulation.
steps.detail: Keep Live Execution: BLOCKED and Broker/OANDA: BLOCKED.

scorecard.blocked_reason: No paper trade sample exists yet.

external_platform_rule.path: Trading Lab -> Tools / Connectors -> External Trading Platforms -> MetaTrader 5 / TradingView / TradersPost

next_safe_action: Run the Paper Bot Core readiness validator.
